reauthWarning.description: We're going to change the Google account associated with your {companyName} user. You will lose all data from previous locations.
reauthWarning.warningDescription:
Your previous Google account data will be permanently deleted and replaced with the data from your current account.

However, your organization data, billing information, and subscription will not be lost: you can edit them in the next step and your current subscription can be modified with the new locations.

support.message: Need help? We're here for you 24/7

hero.title: Your Google Reviews, Answered Automatically
hero.description: Stop losing customers over unanswered reviews. Local Responder uses AI to craft professional, personalized replies. You manage everything from WhatsApp.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in 3 Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No apps to download. No dashboards to learn. Just WhatsApp.

step1.title: Say Hi on WhatsApp
step1.description: Send us a message and our AI assistant guides you through setup. No forms, no passwords, no downloads.

step2.title: Connect Your Business
step2.description: Link your Google Business Profile with one tap. We pull in your location details and start monitoring reviews.

step3.title: Sit Back and Relax
step3.description: AI writes personalized, professional responses to every new review. Approve each one or let it run on autopilot.

whatsappDemo.title: Everything Happens on WhatsApp
whatsappDemo.subtitle: No apps to install. No passwords to remember. Just the messaging app you already use every day.
whatsappDemo.msg1: Hi! I just connected my Google Business Profile. What's next?
whatsappDemo.msg2: Welcome! I found Mario's Pizza (47 reviews). Let's personalize your responses. What tone fits your brand? Friendly and casual, professional, or warm and personal?
whatsappDemo.msg3: Friendly and casual! And always mention our famous sourdough pizza at the end 🍕
whatsappDemo.msg4: Great choice! One more thing: for negative reviews (1-2 stars), should I respond automatically or send you a draft here first for your approval?
whatsappDemo.msg5: Send me drafts for the bad ones. Auto-respond to 4 and 5 stars.
whatsappDemo.msg6: All set! I'll auto-respond to positive reviews in a friendly, casual tone mentioning your sourdough pizza. For negative ones, I'll draft the response and send it here for your approval. Change anything anytime, just message me.

features.title: Built for Busy Business Owners
features.subtitle: You didn't start your business to manage online reviews. We get it.

feature1.title: Truly Personalized Responses
feature1.description: Choose your tone, response length, language, and add a custom call-to-action. Set different rules for each star rating. The AI adapts to your brand, not the other way around.

feature2.title: Zero Learning Curve
feature2.description: If you can send a WhatsApp message, you can use Local Responder. No logins, no dashboards, no tech skills needed.

feature3.title: Always On, Always Fast
feature3.description: Reviews get answered within minutes, 24/7, even on holidays, weekends, and while you sleep.

feature4.title: You Stay in Control
feature4.description: For each star rating, decide: auto-respond, review a draft first, or skip it. Switch between modes anytime with a quick WhatsApp message.

feature5.title: One Price, No Surprises
feature5.description: $20 per location, unlimited responses. No hidden fees, no annual contracts. Cancel anytime.

feature6.title: Your Reputation, Protected
feature6.description: Never miss a review again. Consistent, professional responses show customers you care. Google rewards it too.

reviewImpact.title: Your Reviews Are Your Reputation
reviewImpact.subtitle: And most customers won't wait for an answer.

stat1.description: of customers read online reviews before visiting a local business

stat2.description: more likely to visit a business that responds to reviews

stat3.description: more revenue on average for businesses that reply to reviews

reviewImpact.source: Based on BrightLocal and Harvard Business Review research

pricing.title: One Simple Price
pricing.subtitle: No tiers. No complexity. Everything included.

q1.question: How does Local Responder work?
q1.answer: It's simple: message us on WhatsApp, connect your Google Business Profile, and our AI starts responding to your reviews automatically. Everything (setup, preferences, and management) happens through WhatsApp.

q2.question: Do I need to download an app or use a dashboard?
q2.answer: No! Everything works through WhatsApp, the app you already use. No downloads, no logins, no dashboards to learn.

q3.question: Can I customize how the AI responds?
q3.answer: Absolutely. You choose the tone, response length, language, and even a custom call-to-action to include. You can decide per star rating whether we respond automatically, send you a draft, or skip it entirely. Plus, you can add any special instructions. All through a simple WhatsApp conversation.

q4.question: Will responses sound robotic or generic?
q4.answer: Not at all. Each response is uniquely crafted based on the specific review, your business context, and the style preferences you set. Your customers won't know it's AI.

q5.question: Can I approve responses before they're posted?
q5.answer: You choose! Review and approve each response via WhatsApp before it goes live, or enable autopilot mode and let AI handle everything.

q6.question: Is my data secure?
q6.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and only access the Google Business data you explicitly authorize. We never share your information with third parties.

q7.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q7.answer: Yes, with no penalties. Send us a message on WhatsApp and we'll cancel your subscription immediately. No commitments, no fine print.

cta.title: Ready to Stop Worrying About Reviews?
cta.subtitle: Join local businesses that save hours every week. Setup takes less than 3 minutes.

info.title: How Configuration Management Works
info.description: This page allows you to manage system configurations safely. Changes are saved as drafts and require manual activation to prevent accidental updates.
info.step1: The card above displays your currently active configuration, which is being used by the system.
info.step2: When you modify any settings and click 'Save as draft', a new inactive configuration is created. Your active configuration remains unchanged.
info.step3: To activate a draft configuration, scroll down to the 'All configurations' table, open the configuration you want to activate, and click the 'Activate' button. This ensures you review changes before they go live.
